initial_program:
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.

% Dummy predicate for safety (ensures all variables appear in a positive predicate)
dummy(X) :- true.

% Border predicates
borderLeft(R)  :- input(R, 0, Color),  Color != 0.
borderRight(R) :- input(R, M-1, Color), Color != 0.
borderTop(C)   :- input(0, C, Color),  Color != 0.
borderBottom(C):- input(N-1, C, Color), Color != 0.

% Boundary indices
minRowLeft(N)  :- N = #min{R : input(R, 0, Color), Color != 0 }.
maxRowRight(N) :- N = #max{R : input(R, M-1, Color), Color != 0 }.
minColTop(M)   :- M = #min{C : input(0, C, Color), Color != 0 }.
maxColBottom(M):- M = #max{C : input(N-1, C, Color), Color != 0 }.

% Row inside predicate
rowIn(R) :- R >= minRowLeft(N) + 2, R <= maxRowRight(N) - 2, borderLeft(R), borderRight(R), n_rows(N), true.

% Column inside predicate
colIn(C) :- C >= minColTop(M) + 2, C <= maxColBottom(M) - 2, borderTop(C), borderBottom(C), n_cols(M), true.

% Interior cell predicate
interior(R,C) :- rowIn(R), colIn(C).

% Allowed output colours for a cell
allowed(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.
allowed(R,C,3)   :- input(R,C,0), interior(R,C).
allowed(R,C,0)   :- input(R,C,0), not interior(R,C).

% Output cell predicate (true for every cell)
output_cell(R,C) :- dummy(R), dummy(C), true.

% Exactly one output per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : allowed(R,C,Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.

% Dummy predicate for safety (ensures all variables appear in a positive predicate)
% dummy predicate removed

% Border predicates
borderLeft(R)  :- input(R, 0, Color),  Color != 0.
borderRight(R) :- input(R, M-1, Color), Color != 0.
borderTop(C)   :- input(0, C, Color),  Color != 0.
borderBottom(C):- input(N-1, C, Color), Color != 0.

% Boundary indices
minRowLeft(N)  :- N = #min{R : input(R, 0, Color), Color != 0 }.
maxRowRight(N) :- N = #max{R : input(R, M-1, Color), Color != 0 }.
minColTop(M)   :- M = #min{C : input(0, C, Color), Color != 0 }.
maxColBottom(M):- M = #max{C : input(N-1, C, Color), Color != 0 }.

% Row inside predicate
rowIn(R) :- R >= minRowLeft(N) + 2, R <= maxRowRight(N) - 2, borderLeft(R), borderRight(R), n_rows(N), true.

% Column inside predicate
colIn(C) :- C >= minColTop(M) + 2, C <= maxColBottom(M) - 2, borderTop(C), borderBottom(C), n_cols(M), true.

% Interior cell predicate
interior(R,C) :- rowIn(R), colIn(C).

% Allowed output colours for a cell
allowed(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.
allowed(R,C,3)   :- input(R,C,0), interior(R,C).
allowed(R,C,0)   :- input(R,C,0), not interior(R,C).

% Output cell predicate (true for every cell)
output_cell(R,C) :- true.

% Exactly one output per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : allowed(R,C,Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.

% Dummy predicate for safety (ensures all variables appear in a positive predicate)
% dummy predicate removed

% Border predicates
borderLeft(R)  :- input(R, 0, Color),  Color != 0.
borderRight(R) :- input(R, M-1, Color), Color != 0.
borderTop(C)   :- input(0, C, Color),  Color != 0.
borderBottom(C):- input(N-1, C, Color), Color != 0.

% Boundary indices
minRowLeft(N)  :- N = #min{R : input(R, 0, Color), Color != 0 }.
maxRowRight(N) :- N = #max{R : input(R, M-1, Color), Color != 0 }.
minColTop(M)   :- M = #min{C : input(0, C, Color), Color != 0 }.
maxColBottom(M):- M = #max{C : input(N-1, C, Color), Color != 0 }.

% Row inside predicate
rowIn(R) :- R >= minRowLeft(N) + 2, R <= maxRowRight(N) - 2, borderLeft(R), borderRight(R), n_rows(N), true.

% Column inside predicate
colIn(C) :- C >= minColTop(M) + 2, C <= maxColBottom(M) - 2, borderTop(C), borderBottom(C), n_cols(M), true.

% Interior cell predicate
interior(R,C) :- rowIn(R), colIn(C).

% Allowed output colours for a cell
allowed(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.
allowed(R,C,3)   :- input(R,C,0), interior(R,C).
allowed(R,C,0)   :- input(R,C,0), not interior(R,C).

% Output cell predicate (true for every cell)
output_cell(R,C) :- true.

% Exactly one output per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : allowed(R,C,Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

#show output/3.

final_program:
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.

% Dummy predicate for safety (ensures all variables appear in a positive predicate)
% dummy predicate removed

% Border predicates
borderLeft(R)  :- input(R, 0, Color),  Color != 0.
borderRight(R) :- input(R, M-1, Color), Color != 0.
borderTop(C)   :- input(0, C, Color),  Color != 0.
borderBottom(C):- input(N-1, C, Color), Color != 0.

% Boundary indices
minRowLeft(N)  :- N = #min{R : input(R, 0, Color), Color != 0 }.
maxRowRight(N) :- N = #max{R : input(R, M-1, Color), Color != 0 }.
minColTop(M)   :- M = #min{C : input(0, C, Color), Color != 0 }.
maxColBottom(M):- M = #max{C : input(N-1, C, Color), Color != 0 }.

% Row inside predicate
rowIn(R) :- R >= minRowLeft(N) + 2, R <= maxRowRight(N) - 2, borderLeft(R), borderRight(R), n_rows(N), true.

% Column inside predicate
colIn(C) :- C >= minColTop(M) + 2, C <= maxColBottom(M) - 2, borderTop(C), borderBottom(C), n_cols(M), true.

% Interior cell predicate
interior(R,C) :- rowIn(R), colIn(C).

% Allowed output colours for a cell
allowed(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.
allowed(R,C,3)   :- input(R,C,0), interior(R,C).
allowed(R,C,0)   :- input(R,C,0), not interior(R,C).

% Output cell predicate (true for every cell)
output_cell(R,C) :- true.

% Exactly one output per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : allowed(R,C,Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

#show output/3.
